title: Students and one side headaches: 10 herbal creams to try
description: Cinnamomum camphora creams may help with one-sided headaches due to their anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The creams typically contain camphor, a key constituent that can relax muscles and reduce pain. Other constituents like eucalyptol and linalool may also help to ease tension and soothe the nerves. When using Cinnamomum camphora creams for a one-sided headache, apply a small amount to the affected area, gently massaging it in until absorbed. You can also try applying it ...
